data.name: Porno Empire [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to a world of bold decisions and sweet temptations! Porno Empire [18+] is an adult visual novel that will transport you into a captivating realm of luxurious opportunities and enticing choices.

Plot:
The game's protagonist has endured a period of unemployment and financial hardship, jeopardizing both their life and dreams. However, one day, their fate takes an unexpected turn with a proposition that opens the doors to an entirely different world—they are invited into the realm of a struggling film studio on the brink of bankruptcy.

With mounting debts, dark secrets, and its own tantalizing intrigue, you, as the main character, must make a pivotal decision—take over the management of this studio. Embark on a thrilling journey into the world of lavish actors, talented directors, and personal obstacles to rescue the studio from decline.

Your choices influence the course of the storyline and unlock various narrative paths, enabling you to uncover the true potential of the studio and develop intimate relationships with different characters.

Porno Empire [18+] is a game that challenges you to make important decisions, confront challenges, and unveil new possibilities in the realm of luxurious erotica and sexual temptation. Prepare for significant choices that will shape your destiny and the fate of the film studio, and get ready for the emotional adventures that await you on this grand erotic journey.

Features:
  • A fascinating story
  • A Multitude of Sexy Situations
  • Minigames
  • Real-time 3D character and animations
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.short_description: Welcome to a world of bold decisions and sweet temptations! Porno Empire [18+] is an adult visual novel that will transport you into a captivating realm of luxurious opportunities and enticing choices.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
